positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a friendly, whimsical astronaut floating in deep space. The astronaut, designed with clean, bold lines and a retro sci-fi aesthetic, is surrounded by floating geometric celestial bodies—planets and rings rendered in vibrant, contrasting colors like electric blue, warm magenta, and lime green. The style must be graphic vector art combined with ethereal glow effects, achieving a perfect silhouette effect against a deep indigo nebula background. The composition should be centered and balanced, suitable for a high-quality textile print, emphasizing clean edges and high contrast. Use crisp, flat washes of color and sharp details. Minimalist kawaii style, space opera vibe, vector illustration, strong contrast, centered composition, symmetrical balance.
negative: blur, artifacts, grain, low detail, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low contrast, photorealistic, gradients (too many)
